chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD 2nd Appeal No.71 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) For hearing of C.M.A No.1339/2023 (IX R 9 CPC) 30.10.2025 This matter was dismissed for non-prosecution on 28.04.2023. Thereafter, the appellants filed an application under Order IX Rule 9, C.P.C., which has remained pending for the last several dates. None appeared on behalf of the appellants on the last date of hearing; the same is the case today. No intimation has been received. Consequently, the listed application (C.M.A. No.1339/2023) is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
